name: The Curse of Parnashavari
overview: A tranquil vacation of four friends at a hillside village takes a sinister turn, when they unwittingly incur the wrath of an ancient deity, Devi Parnashavari.

trailers.title: Official Trailer: Parnashavarir Shaap | Chiranjeet | Parambrata Chattopadhyay | 10th Nov | hoichoi
